structural_coherence: The textbook and resource materials information is incorrectly placed after the 'Grading Policy' and 'Late Work Policy' sections, instead of directly under the 'Textbook and/or Resource Materials' heading.
The heading '# E-mail is the primary method of communication.' is an H1 level heading incorrectly nested under '## Additional Course Information'.

new_boilerplate: Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).
# E-mail is the primary method of communication. Include the course number in the subject line. Responses should not be expected after 5:00 PM, on weekends, or on holidays.

- All assignments must be submitted through Canvas. If technical issues prevent submission, send your assignment from your @tamu.edu email to the instructor's @tamu.edu email as a backup. The subject line must include the course number and assignment name.
- Excused absences apply only to attendance and in-class activities and do not extend assignment deadlines.
- Alternatives must be arranged prior to deadline.
- Audio or video recording of lectures or any portion of the course is prohibited without written instructor permission. Unauthorized recording constitutes a violation of student conduct.
proposals.reasoning: The 'new_false_positives' are labels or short phrases that were incorrectly identified as headers by the parser; they should be treated as body text. The 'new_boilerplate' sections contain institutional policies or standard university text that is not specific to this course and likely appears verbatim across all syllabi, thus should be stripped entirely. The H1 header '# E-mail is the primary method of communication.' is included in boilerplate as it's part of a larger institutional text block. The 'text_cleanups' addresses an HTML entity that should be converted to its character equivalent for proper display.
